Name: RDP: Ubuntu 22.04 XFCE (XRDP)
Description: Ubuntu 22.04 with XFCE desktop and XRDP. Connect via Remote Desktop (RDP) on port 3389. Lightweight GUI.
Author: ogultra
Env: START=bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq xrdp xfce4 xfce4-goodies dbus-x11 x11-xserver-utils && echo root:{{RootPassword}} | chpasswd && echo xfce4-session > /root/.xsession && sed -i "s/port=3389/port={{RdpPort}}/" /etc/xrdp/xrdp.ini && service dbus start && exec xrdp-sesman'

Name: RDP: Ubuntu 22.04 KDE (XRDP)
Description: Ubuntu 22.04 with KDE Plasma desktop and XRDP. Full-featured modern desktop via Remote Desktop.
Author: ogultra
Env: START=bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y -qq xrdp kde-plasma-desktop dbus-x11 && echo root:{{RootPassword}} | chpasswd && echo startplasma-x11 > /root/.xsession && sed -i "s/port=3389/port={{RdpPort}}/" /etc/xrdp/xrdp.ini && service dbus start && exec xrdp-sesman'

Name: RDP: Ubuntu 20.04 LXDE (Lightweight XRDP)
Description: Ubuntu 20.04 with LXDE — super lightweight desktop environment. Minimal RAM usage. Perfect for basic tasks.
Author: ogultra
Env: START=bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y -qq xrdp lxde dbus-x11 && echo root:{{RootPassword}} | chpasswd && echo startlxde > /root/.xsession && sed -i "s/port=3389/port={{RdpPort}}/" /etc/xrdp/xrdp.ini && service dbus start && exec xrdp-sesman'
